destinations.evidence: The current 0x0820 agent escrow helper locks Phase 1 fees plus the spawn fee.
Wallet validation uses the spawn-inclusive escrow helper for the current persistent/agent precompile.

equivalence_argument: The v2.2.0 port names the 0x0820 agent path PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE, but the escrow invariant is structurally preserved: wallet lockup equals Phase 1 agent fees plus the Phase 2 spawn fee constant.
notes: This maps the autonomous-agent wording to the current persistent-agent naming in the port.
rationale: The diff changes Autonomous Agent documentation from single-phase fixed pricing to two-phase spawn pricing and changes autonomous_agent_escrow_lockup from fees.total to fees.total + AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Autonomous Agent escrow lockup equals its Phase 1 async fees plus AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI, protecting Phase 2 executor payment up front.
suggested_falsification_tests: For a given input length, compute calculate_autonomous_agent_fees(input_len).total and autonomous_agent_escrow_lockup(input_len), and assert the latter is greater by exactly AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI.
summary: Agent escrow includes the spawn fee in wallet validation.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For a fixed 0x0820 agent input length, assert persistent_agent_escrow_lockup equals calculate_persistent_agent_fees(input_len).total plus PERSISTENT_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI.
title: Autonomous agent escrow includes spawn fee
